message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram

participant "Cache" as Cache
participant "DiskLruCache" as DiskLruCache
participant "JournalFile" as JournalFile
participant "DiskLruCache.Entry" as Entry
participant "LinkedHashMap" as LinkedHashMap
participant "Snapshot" as Snapshot
participant "Cache.Entry" as CacheEntry
participant "Response" as Response
participant "CacheResponseBody" as CacheResponseBody

activate Cache
activate DiskLruCache

Cache -> DiskLruCache: get()
activate DiskLruCache
DiskLruCache -> DiskLruCache: initialize
DiskLruCache -> JournalFile: read
activate JournalFile
JournalFile -> Entry: 
activate Entry
Entry --> DiskLruCache: 
deactivate Entry
deactivate JournalFile
DiskLruCache -> LinkedHashMap: put()
activate LinkedHashMap
LinkedHashMap --> DiskLruCache: 
deactivate LinkedHashMap
DiskLruCache -> LinkedHashMap: get()
activate LinkedHashMap
LinkedHashMap --> Entry: 
activate Entry
Entry --> DiskLruCache: 
deactivate Entry
deactivate LinkedHashMap
DiskLruCache -> Snapshot: 
activate Snapshot
Snapshot --> Cache: 
deactivate Snapshot
deactivate DiskLruCache

Cache -> CacheEntry: response()
activate CacheEntry
CacheEntry -> Response: 
activate Response
Response -> CacheResponseBody: 
activate CacheResponseBody
CacheResponseBody --> Cache: 
deactivate CacheResponseBody
deactivate Response
deactivate CacheEntry
deactivate Cache

@enduml
```
